reviews.comment:
Muy bueno, limpio y ordenado.
El servicio impecable.
Las chicas y chicos, muy atentos en todo momento de la visita. Párrafo a parte para los sándwich que venden.
Volvería sin dudas
Saludos

(Translated by Google)
Very good, clean, and tidy.
The service was impeccable.
The staff were very attentive throughout the visit. A special mention for the sandwiches they sell.
I would definitely return.
Best regards.
